Volume 87 Number 9, September 1999. Invited paper University of California, Berkeley, CA, USA 94720 July 1999 Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT This paper is a highly speculative view of the future of engineering eduction. It is a res

f the future of engineering eduction. It is a response to a similarly predictive paper called "A Day in the Life of a Student in 2012," (Ponte, 1962), which was reprinted together with this paper in a special issue of the Proceedings of the IEEE .
a special issue of the Proceedings of the IEEE .
